---
title: "Quantile Estimation"
output: html_document
---





# S = Beta
# C = Uniform


```{r}

library(MASS)

# long-list proportions
p1_values <- c(0.25, 0.50, 0.75)

# quantile levels
tau_values <- c(0.25, 0.50, 0.75)

# simulation settings
m <- 500
ns <- c(100, 500)
Max <- c(0.1, 0.25, 0.5)
rho_values <- c(-0.5, 0, 0.5)

# grid for quantile estimation
s_grid <- seq(0, 1, by = 0.001)

# function to extract quantile from estimated CDF
quantile_from_cdf <- function(s_grid, Fhat, tau) {
  idx <- which(Fhat >= tau)[1]
  if (is.na(idx)) return(NA_real_)
  return(s_grid[idx])
}

ALL_QUANT_RESULTS <- data.frame()

for (n in ns) {
  for (p1 in p1_values) {
    for (maxc in Max) {
      for (rho in rho_values) {
        
        # store estimated quantiles for each simulation
        q_direct_store <- matrix(NA, nrow = m, ncol = length(tau_values))
        q_ist_store    <- matrix(NA, nrow = m, ncol = length(tau_values))
        
        for (i in 1:m) {
          
          # generate correlated normals
          Z <- mvrnorm(
            n = n,
            mu = c(0, 0),
            Sigma = matrix(c(1, rho, rho, 1), 2, 2)
          )
          
          # convert to uniforms
          U1 <- pnorm(Z[, 1])
          U2 <- pnorm(Z[, 2])
          
          # generate S and C
          S <- qbeta(U1, shape1 = 2, shape2 = 5)
          C <- maxc * U2
          
          # generate list assignment and observed response
          L <- rbinom(n, 1, p1)
          Y <- ifelse(L == 0, C, S + C)
          
          dat  <- data.frame(S, C, L, Y)
          dat0 <- subset(dat, L == 0)
          dat1 <- subset(dat, L == 1)
          
          # avoid empty groups
          if (nrow(dat0) == 0 || nrow(dat1) == 0) next
          
          # Direct empirical CDF of S
          F_direct <- sapply(s_grid, function(s) {
            mean(S <= s)
          })
          
          # empirical CDFs for short and long lists
          F1_hat <- function(y) mean(dat1$Y <= y)
          F0_hat <- function(y) mean(dat0$Y <= y)
          
          # IST estimated CDF of S
          F_ist <- sapply(s_grid, function(s) {
            inner_vals <- sapply(dat0$Y, function(Yi) {
              F1_hat(s + Yi) - F0_hat(Yi)
            })
            min(max(mean(inner_vals) + 0.5, 0), 1)
          })
          
          # estimated quantiles from Direct and IST CDFs
          for (t in seq_along(tau_values)) {
            tau <- tau_values[t]
            
            q_direct_store[i, t] <- quantile_from_cdf(s_grid, F_direct, tau)
            q_ist_store[i, t]    <- quantile_from_cdf(s_grid, F_ist, tau)
          }
        }
        
        # true quantiles of S ~ Beta(2,5)
        true_q <- qbeta(tau_values, shape1 = 2, shape2 = 5)
        TRUE_Q <- matrix(true_q, nrow = m, ncol = length(tau_values), byrow = TRUE)
        
        # helper function for summaries
        summarize_quantiles <- function(q_store, estimator_name) {
          data.frame(
            n = n,
            p1 = p1,
            maxc = maxc,
            rho = rho,
            estimator = estimator_name,
            tau = tau_values,
            true_q = round(true_q, 6),
            avg_q_hat = round(colMeans(q_store, na.rm = TRUE), 6),
            bias_q_hat = round(colMeans(q_store - TRUE_Q, na.rm = TRUE), 6),
            mse_q_hat = round(colMeans((q_store - TRUE_Q)^2, na.rm = TRUE), 6),
            var_q_hat = round(apply(q_store, 2, var, na.rm = TRUE), 6)
          )
        }
        
        results_quant <- rbind(
          summarize_quantiles(q_direct_store, "Direct"),
          summarize_quantiles(q_ist_store, "IST")
        )
        
        ALL_QUANT_RESULTS <- rbind(ALL_QUANT_RESULTS, results_quant)
      }
    }
  }
}

# show all results
print(ALL_QUANT_RESULTS)

# save results
write.csv(ALL_QUANT_RESULTS, "quantile_direct_ist_bias_variance_mse.csv", row.names = FALSE)




```
